productDisplayName: Baggit Women Yuvraj Jhuti Purple Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit and drop it into your messy hold-all. This three-fold piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag. Dimensions: 10 cm x 19 cm Crafted from jute with a two-fold open style One main compartment with eight card holders, two insert pockets and a zippered pocket Printed branding on the front Care Wipe with clean, dry cloth to remove dirt
